locator.quote: profitable agents in the cohort have the *highest* fc rates

text: The two profitable agents in the cohort have the highest fc rates (0.850, 0.862) — fc rate is positively correlated with eval P&L within this architecture.

locator.quote: the safety net is masking the failure mode rather than fixing

text: The smell: the safety net is masking the failure mode rather than fixing it — a policy that can't close settles via the crutch and the cash buckets reconcile, so it stopped looking like a problem.
